title: Happy Birthday Banner, Pastel Rainbow Birthday Decoration with 12 Inch Colorful Latex Confetti Balloons, Birthday Party Decorations for Girls Women Boys Men
features: Pastel Birthday Decoration: You will receive 12 inch balloons (macaron pink ×3, macaron green ×3, macaron blue ×3, macaron purple ×3, pastel confetti balloons ×3), pastel happy birthday banner ×1, white ribbon ×2. Stunning colorful balloons and cheerful birthday banners will brighten up your birthday party

Premium Balloons: Every pastel birthday balloon is crafted from premium latex to make it thicker and more long-lasting than regular balloons. You could relax — they won't burst or leak easily. Happy Birthday banners are made of premium paper. You could adjust the distance between letters and control the length of banner to create a sophisticated and luxurious party atmosphere

Rapid Assembly: Pastel birthday banner for girls equipped with ribbons, banner has small holes for it to pass through. You could work with friends or family to inflate balloons and hang banner from the ceiling, walls or branches in the garden. Enjoy the fun of birthday party planning and easily create a mesmerizing party atmosphere

Happy Birthday Party Decoration: Pastel rainbow balloons with banner is an ideal choice for decorating birthday parties enjoyed by both kids and adults! Whether it's an indoor or outdoor venue, colorful banner for women could be an eye-catching focal point that makes guests feel the magic of the party

Warm Tips: The balloons support filling with air or helium. We recommend inflating to 85% - 90% is enough. Once inflated, you could rub the confetti balloons on wool or dry towel, and shake the balloons to make the confetti adhere to it. As the party draws to a close, you could puncture confetti balloons and let them sprinkle a rain of confetti to decorate every corner
